description: A judgment against the company in Contract A triggers a cross-default clause in Loan Contract B. Agent must assess_counterparty_risk and cross_reference before acting to discover this chain.

clauses.text: Failure to deliver the software platform by the contractual milestone date triggers liquidated damages of $600,000, which may be enforced by MegaCorp as a judgment without further notice.

Any judgment, award, or order against Borrower in excess of $500,000, or any default under any other material credit agreement, shall constitute a Cross-Default under this facility, entitling the Bank to accelerate all outstanding principal immediately.

dependency_edges.description: MegaCorp enforcing the $600K LD judgment triggers the cross-default clause in the credit facility — bank can accelerate all debt immediately.

deadlines.description: Negotiate with MegaCorp before LD judgment is enforced (Day 7)
deadlines.consequence_description: $600K judgment triggers cross-default on credit facility — bank can accelerate all debt.

shock_events.title: Milestone Miss — MegaCorp Preparing $600K Judgment
shock_events.description: ProbeTest has missed a key software delivery milestone. MegaCorp is preparing to enforce $600K in liquidated damages as a court judgment. HIDDEN: if that judgment is entered, it triggers the cross-default clause in NationalBank's credit facility, allowing the bank to call all outstanding debt immediately. Agent must cross-reference contracts to discover this before MegaCorp acts.

initial_inbox.subject: Notice of Intent to Enforce Liquidated Damages — $600,000
initial_inbox.body: ProbeTest Corp Delta has failed to deliver the agreed platform by the contractual milestone date. Pursuant to Section 9.3, MegaCorp will seek enforcement of $600,000 in liquidated damages within 7 days unless delivery is made or a satisfactory remediation plan is agreed.
